place: Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Four-Bedroom Designer Pool Villa with Family Room, Steps from Canggu's Cafés
blurb: A four-bedroom, two-storey designer villa a short walk from Canggu's cafés and beaches, set on 700 m² around a 7m pool with a hammock gazebo and daybeds, with a dedicated kids' room, a double-height living space and a master suite opening to a pool-view balcony.
detail:
The two-storey villa sits on 700 m² and sleeps up to eight adults with room for two children. Two queen bedrooms on the ground floor open straight to the pool and garden; upstairs, the master suite takes a king bed, a dressing table and a private balcony over the water, alongside a family room fitted with a queen bed, bunks and a baby cot. Bathrooms are worked in poured concrete and stonework, several semi-outdoor, one with a soaking tub.

Interiors lean on smooth cement, warm timber, rattan and quiet metallic notes. At the heart is a double-height living area wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glass around an indoor garden, so daylight and greenery pour in whether the air-conditioning is on or the doors are open. Meals gather at an eight-seater table or the kitchen's breakfast bar, and a grill by the pool makes an easy case for dining in.

Outdoors, a 7m pool is edged by daybeds and a gazebo strung with a hammock for slow afternoons. A resident team looks after daily housekeeping, the garden and overnight security, and a private chef versed in Western, Indonesian, Asian and children's cooking can be arranged on request. Canggu's cafés, surf shops and beach clubs are all within a short stroll.
